markdown:
#  Publish Personal Drawing Markups (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Standard' or 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * Published markups can be edited or deleted. Any changes to these markups will automatically be visible to anyone with access to the drawing.* 'Standard' users can only edit personal and published markups that they've created.* Published markups can only be deleted by users with 'Admin' level permissions on the Drawings tool unless [granted specific permissions to delete published markups](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/allow-users-to-delete-published-markups).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool using the Procore app on an Android device.
  2. Tap the **magnifying glass** ![Icon Search Android](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7a1567256d48c74dc58bb9c7434e387f/a8d92f24d7f05df73dfd626cc536b400/icon-search-android.png?fm=webp&h=18) iconto search and filter for the drawing to which you want to publish personal markups.
  3. Tap the drawing.
  4. Tap the existing drawing markup you would like to publish or add a new markup by selecting a tool from the markup toolbar. See [Markup a Drawing (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing-android).
  5. Tap **Publish**.  
![2017 11 16 11 45 22](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8de010941a6a28ee1465fddcec73110d/d52e4827e1504e821a99d3f8afbe8f93/2017-11-16_11-45-22.png?fm=webp)  
_Note:_ Changes are automatically saved.


## See Also
  * [View Drawing Markups (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/view-drawing-markups-android)
  * [Mark up a Drawing (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing-android)
  * [Drawings (Android) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/permissions)
title: Publish Personal Drawing Markups (Android)
description: How to publish personal drawing markups using the Procore app on an Android device so that others can reference the markup.
